record.field: Dojang CRM: Qualified — Book Your Free Trial (Email)
Book Your Free Trial Class — {{ object.company_id.name }}
{{ object.email_from }}

You're Invited — Try a Class for Free!

Hi {{ object.contact_name or object.partner_name or 'there' }},

Thank you for your interest in {{ object.company_id.name }}! We'd love to have you try a class before you commit.

Click below to pick a session that suits your schedule:

Book My Free Trial

This link is unique to you and expires in 7 days.

— {{ object.company_id.name }}
Dojang CRM: Trial Booked Confirmation (Email)
Your Free Trial is Confirmed! 🥋
{{ object.email_from }}

Your Trial Class is Booked!

Hi {{ object.contact_name or object.partner_name or 'there' }},

We're excited to have you join us for a free trial class! Here are your booking details:

{% if object.trial_session_id %} {% if object.trial_session_id.instructor_profile_id %} {% endif %}
Class {{ object.trial_session_id.name }}
Date & Time {{ object.trial_session_id.start_datetime | datetime }}
Instructor {{ object.trial_session_id.instructor_profile_id.name }}
{% endif %}

Please arrive 10 minutes early. Wear comfortable workout clothes.

A calendar invitation (.ics) is attached to this email.

{% if object.trial_manage_url %}
Need to cancel or reschedule? Click here to manage your booking.
{% endif %}

We look forward to meeting you!

— {{ object.company_id.name }}
Dojang CRM: Trial-in-progress — Post-Trial Offer (Email)
Great Class Today — Here's a Special Offer for You 🥋
{{ object.email_from }}

We Loved Having You!

Hi {{ object.contact_name or object.partner_name or 'there' }},

Thank you for attending your free trial class today. We hope you had a great time!

We'd love to have you join our community. As a thank-you for attending, we're offering you a special limited-time membership rate.

This offer is valid for 72 hours.
Contact us or visit your member portal to enroll.

Questions? Simply reply to this email or give us a call.

— {{ object.company_id.name }}
Dojang CRM: Missed Trial — Re-engage Lead (Email)
We Missed You — Book a New Trial Class
{{ object.email_from }}

Your Trial Has Expired

Hi {{ object.contact_name or object.partner_name or 'there' }},

It looks like the trial class you booked has passed. No worries — we'd love to give you another chance to experience a class at {{ object.company_id.name }}.

{% if object.trial_booking_url %}
Book a New Trial
{% endif %}

Or simply reply to this email and we'll find a time that works for you.

— {{ object.company_id.name }}
Dojang CRM: Missed Trial — Internal Alert (Email)
[CRM] Missed Trial: {{ object.contact_name or object.partner_name }}
{{ object.user_id.email if object.user_id else '' }}

Missed Trial — Action Needed

The trial for lead {{ object.contact_name or object.partner_name or 'Unknown' }} has passed without attendance.

Lead {{ object.name }}
Phone {{ object.phone or 'N/A' }}
Score {{ object.dojo_lead_score }}/100

Please follow up manually to re-engage this prospect.
Dojang CRM: No-Show Reschedule Follow-Up (Email)
We Missed You — Let's Find a Better Time
{{ object.email_from }}

We Missed You!

Hi {{ object.contact_name or object.partner_name or 'there' }},

It looks like you weren't able to make it to your free trial class. No worries — life happens!

{% if object.trial_booking_url %}
Reschedule My Trial
{% endif %}

Or reply to this email and we'll find a new time for you.

— {{ object.company_id.name }}
Dojang CRM: Trial Class Reminder — 24h (Email)
Reminder: Your Free Trial is Tomorrow! 🥋
{{ object.email_from }}

See You Tomorrow!

Hi {{ object.contact_name or object.partner_name or 'there' }},

Just a friendly reminder that your free trial class is coming up!

{% if object.trial_session_id %} {% if object.trial_session_id.instructor_profile_id %} {% endif %}
Class {{ object.trial_session_id.name }}
Date & Time {{ object.trial_session_id.start_datetime | datetime }}
Instructor {{ object.trial_session_id.instructor_profile_id.name }}
{% endif %}

Please arrive 10 minutes early. Wear comfortable workout clothes.

{% if object.trial_manage_url %}

Need to cancel or reschedule? Manage your booking here.

{% endif %}

— {{ object.company_id.name }}
Dojang CRM: Evaluation — Membership Plan Details (Email)
Your Personalised Membership Offer is Ready 🥋
{{ object.email_from }}

Your Membership Offer

Hi {{ object.contact_name or object.partner_name or 'there' }},

We've put together a personalised membership offer just for you based on your recent trial class. Here are the details:

Ready to join? Contact us to lock in your membership today.

⏰ This offer expires 72 hours from receipt.

To get started, simply reply to this email or give us a call. We'll handle the paperwork and get you on the mat!

We look forward to welcoming you to the team.

— {{ object.company_id.name }}
Dojang CRM: Offer Expiry Nudge — 72h (Email)
Last Chance — Your Offer Expires Soon ⚠️
{{ object.email_from }}

Your Offer is About to Expire!

Hi {{ object.contact_name or object.partner_name or 'there' }},

We wanted to reach out one more time because your special membership offer is expiring very soon.

Don't miss out — this offer was made just for you.

If you have any questions or need more time, just reply to this email and we'll work something out. We'd love to have you on the mat!

— {{ object.company_id.name }}
Dojang CRM: No-Show 2nd Follow-Up — 5 Days (Email)
Still Interested? We'd Love to Have You 🥋
{{ object.email_from }}

We're Still Here For You!

Hi {{ object.contact_name or object.partner_name or 'there' }},

We reached out a few days ago after you missed your trial class. We completely understand that life gets busy!

We have classes running throughout the week at multiple times, so there's sure to be a slot that suits you.

{% if object.trial_booking_url %}
Book a New Trial
{% endif %}

No pressure at all. We'll be here whenever you're ready!

— {{ object.company_id.name }}
